_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of focal adhesion kinase impairs tumor formation and preserves hearing in a murine model of NF2-related schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: Evaluation of auditory brainstem reflex (ABR) thresholds at 4 and 10 months of age demonstrated that both hetero- and homozygous deletion of Fak protected against hearing loss
details: Successfully measured auditory brainstem reflex thresholds at 4 and 10 months of age to assess hearing protection
